element_extract.core_engine: Repeated failure memory becomes tactical pressure; the protagonist survives by converting prior loss into a sharper next attempt.
element_extract.protagonist_pressure: The protagonist knows enough to fear the next mistake but not enough to avoid paying a cost.
scene_engine: failed outcome is remembered as actionable evidence
new attempt begins with one corrected choice
small win reveals a larger fixed actor
reader_effect: curiosity about what is fixed across loops
pressure from a cost that cannot be reset cleanly
anti_patterns: simple save-load fantasy with no irreversible cost
explaining the loop rules before the first pressured choice
